'''Zadalgo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who worked as a [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] dealer for [[Sebolto]]'s gang during the years following the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Biography==
About [[32 BBY/Legends|10 years before]] the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], the [[Pixelito Grand Council]] issued a bounty for his capture in connection with several crimes. The bounty, which was worth 5,000 credits alive and 2,500 credits dead was later claimed by the notorious bounty hunter [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] during his attempt to get to Sebolto.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
